title: Reference Fusion Atlas
description: A reference-dependent series where one sixteen-tile source board drives three fusion scenes.
creative_direction: Image 01 creates a public synthetic reference board with sixteen distinct cues; images 02-04 depend on it as --ref and fuse those cues into new coherent scenes.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Reference Fusion Atlas
en.description: A reference-dependent series where one sixteen-tile source board drives three fusion scenes.

zh-CN.title: 参考融合图谱
zh-CN.description: 一张十六格来源板驱动三张融合场景的参考依赖系列。
